step4_pre_edit.branch_structure: count-based (not mode-based): exactly-1 actionable → silent dispatch; 2-or-more → AskUserQuestion with top-3 list
notable_clauses: Exactly 1 actionable finding → state classification in one line and proceed to Step 5. No prompt.
2 or more actionable findings → show top 3, ask via AskUserQuestion with options: dispatch #1, pick different, abort
Do NOT dispatch before the user responds.

tests_baseline.note: Verification is Read-based textual assertion. No executable test runner.
